title: Create a privacy-safe governance packet
persona: IT governance lead with settings edit access
steps: Review the live source summary across assistant audit events, evidence, prompts, review examples, operating reports, and assistant email threads.
expected: A persisted AssistantGovernancePacket is created with retentionPlanJson, exportManifestJson, deletionRequestJson, legalHoldJson, privacyReviewJson, auditPlanJson, and leadershipSummary.
The packet redacts privacy-risk titles in export and privacy sections.
An AssistantAuditEvent is written for packet creation.
No audit event, evidence record, prompt, review example, report, email thread, export, archive, or deletion state is mutated automatically.

title: Queue retention/export/deletion review
persona: Compliance owner with settings edit access
steps: Create or select a DRAFT governance packet.
Add an approval note that summarizes intended retention and deletion review.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED with actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with actionKind assistant_governance_review.
An AssistantAuditEvent records that archive, export, deletion, and source-system changes were not applied automatically.

title: Legal hold blocks destructive governance actions
steps: Ensure at least one assistant-governed record includes legal hold, litigation, audit hold, or do not delete language.
Review retention, deletion, and legal-hold sections.
expected: Legal-hold records appear in legalHoldJson and auditPlanJson blockedActions.
Retention candidates with legal hold are marked HOLD instead of ARCHIVE_REVIEW.
The UI presents privacy-safe metadata and requires queue review before any archive/export/delete operation.
